practice_description: Shadow sentences extracted from your recent Live sessions. Record and get scored.
practice_error_load: Failed to load practice. Please try again.
practice_empty_body: Start a Live session first. We'll extract shadowing drills from the last 7 days.
progress_description: Your shadowing score trend over time.
progress_error_load: Failed to load progress. Please try again.
progress_recent_empty: No attempts yet. Do a practice session to get your first score.
hero_description: FluentluBy.ai helps you bridge the gap to fluency. Turn your favorite content into interactive language lessons with AI-powered chat, summaries, and real-world practice.
screenshot_caption: Ask questions about the video content directly
features_desc_1: Learning Spanish and Japanese? No problem. FluentluBy.ai supports any language available on YouTube.
features_desc_2: Don't just watch—interact. Have a conversation with the video characters or the content itself.
features_desc_3: Step into the scene. Practice real-world conversations simulated from the video context.
features_desc_4: Your content, your choice. Select any video from your YouTube playlists to start learning immediately.
faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about mastering languages with FluentluBy.ai.
faq_q1: Is FluentluBy.ai suitable for complete beginners?
faq_a1: FluentluBy.ai is optimized for intermediate to advanced learners who already have a basic grasp of the language. We focus on bridging the gap to fluency using authentic native content, which can be overwhelming for absolute beginners.
faq_a2: You can learn any language! Since our platform is built on top of YouTube, if you can find a video in that language with captions, you can learn it with FluentluBy.ai.
faq_q3: How does the 'Chat with Video' feature work?
faq_a3: Our AI analyzes the video's transcript and context to create an interactive comprehension experience. You can ask specific questions about what happened, request explanations of cultural nuances, or even role-play with characters from the video.
faq_q4: Do I need a paid YouTube account?
faq_a4: No, you don't need a YouTube Premium account. FluentluBy.ai works with standard YouTube videos available publicly.
footer_text: FluentluBy.ai. Master languages with the videos you love.
signin_description: Sign in with Google to start learning with your playlists.
signin_error_generic: Unable to sign in with Google
signin_cancelled: Google sign-in was cancelled or failed. Please try again.

empty_video_description: You haven't added any videos yet. Go to your playlists to add videos to your library.

live_page_subtitle: Practice speaking with an AI conversation partner
live_persona_friend_desc: Relaxed chat partner for everyday conversation
live_persona_tutor_desc: Patient teacher who corrects pronunciation and grammar
live_personalize_hint: Want better live conversations? Personalize from the controls bar below.
live_personalize_description: Record a short intro so Live feels more tailored.
live_personalize_record_desc: Talk for 20–40 seconds about your goals, preferred topics, and how you want corrections.
live_personalize_privacy_note: We don’t store your audio or raw coordinates.
live_personalize_apply_note: Changes apply next time you start Live.
live_personalize_geo_desc: We use your location once to infer country/region/city. Coordinates are not saved.
live_personalize_success: Saved. It will apply next time you start Live.
live_personalize_tour_record_desc: Tell your goals and preferences. We use it to build your Live profile.
live_personalize_tour_geo_desc: Share location once to infer country/region/city (no coordinates stored).
live_personalize_tour_generate_desc: This will be applied the next time you start Live.

live_assessment_empty: Assessment will appear after you end the call.
live_history_empty_hint: Start a live call to see it here.
live_history_delete_confirm: Delete this session? This cannot be undone.
